name: LVGL Animations
description: An animation smoothly changes one or more [style properties](https://esphome.io/components/lvgl#lvgl-styling) of one or more widgets over a period of time. Each animation interpolates every configured property from a `from` value to a `to` value across its `duration`, optionally applying a [timing function](https://esphome.io/components/lvgl/animation#timing-functions) to shape the progression.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: Specifies how to encode image internally. See the image component for more information. per pixel, 8 pixels per byte. Only chroma_key transparency is available.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the animation, used to reference it from the [`lvgl.animation.start`](https://esphome.io/components/lvgl/animation#lvgl-animation-start-action) action.

config_entries.label: File
config_entries.description: The path (relative to where the .yaml file is) of the gif file.

config_entries.label: Loop
config_entries.description: If you want to loop over a subset of your animation (e.g. a fire animation where the fire "starts", then "burns" and "dies") you can specify some frames to loop over.

config_entries.label: Resize
config_entries.description: If set, this will resize all the frames to fit inside the given dimensions WIDTHxHEIGHT and preserve the aspect ratio.

config_entries.label: Transparency
config_entries.description: If set the alpha channel of the input image will be taken into account. The possible values are opaque (default), chroma_key and alpha_channel. See discussion on transparency in the image component.
